custom-sql.sql: SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.koroneikiAccountKey = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.koroneikiProductPurchaseKey = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKeySet.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.licenseEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.productId) = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.owner) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.hostName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.ipAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.macAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.serverId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.key_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId, OSB_LicenseKey.startDate, OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.koroneikiAccountKey = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.koroneikiProductPurchaseKey = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKeySet.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.licenseEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.productId) = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.owner) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.hostName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.ipAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.macAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.serverId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_LicenseKey.key_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId WHERE ( (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 2) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId WHERE ( (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 2) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) )
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON OSB_LicenseKey.userId = User_.userId
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = User_.userId
